case_title: SUNNY WEBB ET AL VS. ALEX BEILIN

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF SUNNY WEBB IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM KIPP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEX BEILIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEBB, SUNNY KIPP, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEILIN, ALEX $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,875.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS SUNNY WEBB AND WILLIAM KIPP JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,890.00 FILED BY WEBB, SUNNY KIPP, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT BEILIN, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
